acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Generated Hyprland output is node-scoped and cleaned up.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: hyprland-monitors-with-output.json contains madobe-qd-m2-capture-one-frame; hyprland-monitors-after-remove.json contains zero entries with that name.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Direct Wayland protocol path is evidenced.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: wayland-output-inventory.txt plus wayland-ext-output-source.txt and wayland-ext-image-copy.txt show the target output and required globals.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Buffer path, size, format, modifier, timestamp, and sync mode are not overclaimed.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validation-summary.json records metadata observed before failure and explicitly marks readyEventSeen=false and successfulFrameCapture=false.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Blocked status includes exact missing condition and next unblocker.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: blocker.md records missing ext_image_copy_capture_frame_v1.ready and recommends driver-native modifier allocation or compositor/protocol acceptance of the implicit-modifier PRIME fd.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Live output creation, protocol inventory, DMA-BUF frame attempt, fallback allocation, and cleanup evidence were collected on the Linux host.

findings.title: Direct capture frame never reached ready
findings.observed: The direct ext-image-copy probe emitted timestamp, damage, and transform events, then returned frame.failed reason 0 after render-node and card-node DMA-BUF allocation attempts.
findings.expected: The capture frame should emit ext_image_copy_capture_frame_v1.ready so the node can claim a completed frame and protocol-ready implicit synchronization.
findings.acceptanceCriterion: One frame can be captured from the remote output; metadata includes sync mode.
findings.reproduction: Run the temporary direct_capture_probe against madobe-qd-m2-capture-one-frame as documented in evidence/m2-capture-one-frame/commands.log.
findings.suggestedFix: Use a driver-native allocator that can create an advertised NVIDIA block-linear DMA-BUF modifier, or adjust the compositor/protocol path to accept the implicit-modifier dumb-buffer PRIME fd.
